global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with an app interface showcasing food delivery options.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery with a focus on user cravings and a special offer.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: FreshDash logo
elements.description: The logo 'FreshDash' appears at the top, featuring a modern font in white against the purple background.

elements.label: App interface
elements.description: A mockup of an app interface is displayed in the center, showing three empty slots for food items.

elements.label: App interface
elements.description: Another view of the app interface, showcasing additional food item slots.

elements.label: Food item slot
elements.description: A circular slot for a food item is visible, indicating a selection option.

elements.label: Food item slot
elements.description: Another circular slot for a food item, similar to the previous one.

elements.label: Food item slot
elements.description: A third circular slot for a food item, completing the interface design.

elements.label: Decorative circle
elements.description: A decorative circle element is placed in the center, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Decorative circle
elements.description: Another decorative circle element, enhancing the app interface design.

elements.label: Decorative circle
elements.description: A third decorative circle element, contributing to the overall aesthetic.

elements.label: Cravings message
elements.description: The text 'Your cravings, delivered' is prominently displayed in white at the bottom.

elements.label: Delivery offer
elements.description: The text 'Free delivery over $15' is shown below the main message, emphasizing the offer.

elements.label: Cravings message
elements.description: A repeated text element reinforcing the message about cravings.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A prominent 'Order now' button is located at the bottom, inviting user action.
elements.text_content: Your cravings, delivered Fre ~ Wf Order now

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small 'SALE' badge is positioned at the top right, indicating a promotional offer.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A 'UGC' label is displayed at the top left, suggesting user-generated content.
